title: Meridian UK Private Wealth Mandate
content:
MERIDIAN UK PRIVATE WEALTH MANDATE - ALTERNATIVE INVESTMENTS PORTFOLIO

This mandate provides sophisticated private wealth clients access to a diversified portfolio of alternative investments, including private equity, hedge funds, structured products, and real estate investment trusts. The strategy targets high-net-worth individuals seeking enhanced returns through non-traditional asset classes.

PORTFOLIO COMPOSITION AND ALLOCATION
The mandate maintains strategic allocations across four primary alternative sectors: Private Equity (35-45%), Hedge Funds (25-35%), Real Estate (15-25%), and Structured Products (10-15%). Current yield targeting ranges from 12-18% annually, with expected volatility between 15-22%. As demonstrated in our flagship Account #MW-8734-2156, managed by Senior Portfolio Manager Robert J. Williams, the strategy has delivered consistent alpha generation over traditional equity benchmarks.

RISK PARAMETERS AND SUITABILITY
This aggressive risk mandate is exclusively available to Private Wealth clients with investable assets exceeding £2 million and demonstrated sophistication in alternative investments. Clients must acknowledge potential capital losses of 25-40% during adverse market conditions. The investment horizon typically spans 5-7 years to optimize illiquidity premiums inherent in alternative strategies.

REGULATORY COMPLIANCE FRAMEWORK
Meridian Wealth Partners maintains strict adherence to FCA COBS 9.2 suitability requirements, conducting comprehensive client assessments before mandate inception. All alternative investments undergo rigorous due diligence protocols, with quarterly portfolio reviews mandatory for Private Wealth tier clients. Client assets are segregated in accordance with FCA CASS regulations, ensuring complete protection of investor capital through authorized custodial arrangements.

FEE STRUCTURE AND PERFORMANCE METRICS
The mandate employs a tiered fee structure: 1.25% annual management fee plus 15% performance fee above 8% annual returns. Performance measurement utilizes risk-adjusted metrics including Sharpe ratios, maximum drawdown analysis, and alpha generation relative to FTSE All-Share benchmarks. Historical performance demonstrates consistent outperformance with average annual returns of 14.7% over the past five-year period.

INVESTMENT PROCESS AND GOVERNANCE
Our investment committee, chaired by Managing Director Sarah Chen-Morrison, convenes monthly to review portfolio positioning and alternative investment opportunities. Due diligence encompasses operational risk assessment, manager track records, and liquidity profiling. For additional information regarding mandate specifics or to schedule a consultation, Private Wealth clients may contact our dedicated service line at (020) 7946-5832.

RISK DISCLOSURES
Alternative investments carry substantial risks including illiquidity, leverage exposure, and potential total loss of capital. Past performance does not guarantee future results. This mandate is unsuitable for conservative investors or those requiring regular income distributions. Clients should carefully review all risk disclosures and mandate documentation before proceeding with investment instructions.
